programs.programName: Elderly and Persons with Physical Disabilities (EPD) Waiver Program

verified.notes: Age requirement for seniors is 65+. Income limit stated as '300% SSI or Spend Down eligible' (not a fixed dollar amount) and varies by household composition; specific monthly thresholds not provided in authoritative sources retrieved. Phone number for application assistance not found in search results. Asset limit of $4,000 applies to individuals; couple asset limit not specified in sources. Program status: Approved and active as of search results.

verified.notes: DACL Benefits Assistance helps apply for Medicaid/SNAP which have their own eligibility (e.g. seniors often 60+ per DACL programs); no program-specific age/income/asset tests found in official sources

verified.notes: No income or asset limits found in official sources; program open to DC seniors 60+ with no means test indicated. Multiple centers with individual phones; main DACL phone used.
